#  Budget Modifications 
#####  Legacy Content
The Budget Modifications feature is being replaced by a [new Budget Changes feature](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-budget-changes/). Starting in October 2022, Procore will be working with Procore customers to migrate from budget modifications to the Budget Changes feature by October 16, 2023. Once you migrate, you will no longer have access to the budget modifications feature. If you have any questions before your company starts the migration, contact your Procore point of contact.
#### Sample Report Page
![Procore Analytics Financials Budget Budget Modifications](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/41230da632b21ce72435bcd8d30126b4/4ed9c05e6906a3101123d7ba5f8bb48d/procore-analytics-financials-budget-budget-modifications.png?fm=webp)
_This sample report page was created using mock data for demonstration purposes only._
